text.value: Laboratory Report

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Most parameters are within normal limits. Notable findings include mild leukopenia, slightly elevated hematocrit, high platelet indices, marginally elevated chloride, and low urine specific gravity. These may reflect mild dehydration or hemoconcentration. No evidence of renal dysfunction, infection, or glycosuria. Recommend clinical correlation and, if indicated, repeat CBC and hydration assessment.

text.value: Mohammed Kronenberg

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction
